groups.thesis: Sector under pressure with avg YTD return of -14.9%. Weak breadth — just 0/5 stocks outperforming S&P 500. 60% above 50-day MA, trend intact but mixed. Neutral momentum (avg RSI 47) — potential accumulation zone.
